old_claim.note: Basic Rope Making is an earlier historical predecessor or foundation, not a one-to-one engineering dependency.

new_claim_absent: The scoped surviving artifact is a wooden rod and no longer combines measuring lines or ropes into the same node.

source_shape.source_locator: Object record: identifies a wooden Egyptian cubit measuring rod from Dynasties 12-13, dated about 1981-1640 BCE.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The Met documents a surviving wooden Egyptian cubit rod dated about 1981-1640 BCE.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The scoped evidence establishes the milestone without the removed dependency. The scoped surviving artifact is a wooden rod and no longer combines measuring lines or ropes into the same node.

ontology_before: measuring_rods_and_lines treated basic_rope_making as a direct causal prerequisite.
